title: polyscias rufosepala
intro: Polyscias rufosepala, also known as the copperleaf or copper-leaved polynesian, is a species of plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the Pacific Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias rufosepala include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or oil form to harness its medicinal properties.
